data.name: Monster Girl Evolution
data.detailed_description:
Monster Girl Evolution is a seductive clicker–incremental game where your goal is to guide the transformation of various monster girls through stages of evolution—each more mesmerizing, bizarre, and unpredictable than the last.

Strategize, upgrade, and evolve as you oversee the growth of beautifully designed monster girls. Witness each one’s unique transformation path—whether they blossom into divine goddesses of desire or mutate into otherworldly horrors beyond imagination. Every click brings them closer to their final form.

Your journey is simple yet addictive: click, evolve, and ascend.
Each tap generates SYLPHS, the mystical energy driving your progress. Use them wisely to unlock powerful upgrades, multipliers, and evolution branches.

With patience (and a lot of clicking), you’ll reveal the true potential of every monster girl—an ever-shifting balance between beauty, power, and monstrosity.

☕ HOW TO PLAY

Monster Girl Evolution is easy to pick up but devilishly addictive:

  • Click your character to generate SYLPHS, the core currency of evolution.

  • Invest SYLPHS to unlock upgrades that accelerate growth and transformation.

  • Watch each monster girl’s appearance evolve across multiple stages—each form more intricate and alluring than the last.

As you progress, new resource systems become available to enhance production and expand gameplay depth:

  • Verulets – Amplify your maximum upgrade levels.

  • Sinuates – Increase the multiplier effect of cells gained per click.

  • Luminettes – Boost the yield from each click based on accumulated Genes.

  • Zephyrants – Harness neural energy to supercharge cell generation.

  • Celestines – Act as autonomous clickers, producing cells over time.

  • Fluxells – Strengthen your offensive power against hostile Etrions.

  • Vorticles – Rare immortal cells that unlock Transcendence—allowing you to reset with immense bonuses and enter new realms of evolution.

With every new tier, your progress compounds, your monster girls evolve faster, and your empire of transformations grows ever stranger.

data.short_description: Click, evolve, and transform! 💋Guide gorgeous monster girls through bizarre evolutions—from cute to cosmic, from seductive to monstrous. Generate SYLPHS, unlock upgrades, and witness every transformation in this addictive incremental evolution game!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
